title: DreamBox Lowest Price Ever and Create Room 4th of July Sale
excerpt: Have you ever purchased something and wondered how you ever lived without it? That’s exactly how I feel about my craft organization and storage unit - the DreamBox from Create Room ! The DreamBox gets my creative juices flowing in…
body:
Have you ever purchased something and wondered how you ever lived without it? That’s exactly how I feel about my craft organization and storage unit - the DreamBox from Create Room!

   

The DreamBox gets my creative juices flowing in so many ways:

  • Having my tools and supplies out of my way and organized in designated shelves gives me a fresh slate to start working on new projects.

  • My DreamBox is organized in rainbow order. Just looking at all those pretty colors fills me with so much happiness and inspiration! 

   

  • Having my supplies displayed in the DreamBox (instead of hidden away or piled up) motivates me to actually use them to create. 

  • The DreamBox is like a craft room/office in a box! It’s great for when you don’t have an extra room in your home to spare. 

  • Check out my video tour of my DreamBox and my studio here!

Create Room 4th of July Sale!

Right now, you can get your very own DreamBox too during Create Room’s 4th of July Sale! This is the biggest discount they have on the DreamBox at the LOWEST PRICE EVER!

   

Create Room and DreamBox Discount Codes

Use code AMYTANGERINESTARS to get 15% off the DreamBox. Plus save even more during this sale - 

  • Get 20% off Accessories (my favorite is the Paper Organizer), the DreamCart, & the Sew Station with code AMYTANGERINEFOURTH!

  • 15% off the new cubby with code AMYTANGERINECELEBRATE

  • Canadian friends get 15% off EVERYTHING with code AMYTANGERINECANADA 

You’re getting early access to Create Room’s biggest sale TODAY, June 25th @ 11 am MT (10 am Pacific) through July 6th @ 11:59 pm MT (10:59 pm Pacific). 

EXCULSIVE Amy Tangerine BONUS!

Got a question about the DreamBox or about craft organization? Let me know in the comments!
